SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,950.00 FILED BY DISSMEYER, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT TOM'S METAL SPECIALISTS,INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING [HEARING AUG-28-23 AT 3:30PM] (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT TOM'S METAL SPECIALISTS,INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-26-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF DAVID DISSMEYER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TOM'S METAL SPECIALISTS, INC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TOM S CHANG (CHAIRMAN). PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISSMEYER, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOM'S METAL SPECIALISTS,INC $2,550.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00, SEE ATTACHMENT ONE (MC-025). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TOM'S METAL SPECIALISTS,INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-26-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
